ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the currency */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 code for the currency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the currency is primarily used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate record */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency */,
  "current_price" TEXT /* Current exchange rate */,
  "converted_price" TEXT /* Converted price based on a standard amount */,
  "converted_price_adjusted" TEXT /* Adjusted converted price based on significant market shifts */,
  "lowest_recorded_price" TEXT /* Lowest recorded price */,
  "lowest_recorded_price_adjusted" TEXT /* Adjusted lowest recorded price based on significant market shifts */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "market_open_price" TEXT /* Market open price for the currency */,
  "market_close_price" TEXT /* Market close price for the currency */,
  "market_high_price" TEXT /* Highest market price for the currency */,
  "market_low_price" TEXT /* Lowest market price for the currency */,
  "priceChange_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., observer, trader, enterprise client) */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for basic, 5 for premium) */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, trial) */,
  "subscription_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the currency data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, conversion) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the user's interaction with the currency data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the trend was observed */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "trend_value" TEXT /* Value of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_value" TEXT /* Value of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key value */,
  "api_key_type" TEXT /* Type of API key (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "subscription_description" TEXT /* Description of the subscription plan */,
  "subscription_price" TEXT /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)
